crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: INDICATOR-COMPROMISE Request for external IP address detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET $HTTP_PORTS ( msg:"INDICATOR-COMPROMISE Request for external IP address detected"; flow:to_server,established; http_header; content:"Host: ipecho.net",fast_pattern,nocase; http_uri; content:"/plain"; http_header; content:!"User-Agent|3A|"; metadata:policy max-detect-ips drop; service:http; reference:url,www.virustotal.com/#/file/a036279e3c27f0e716b8fa4b5c7378805b9788c7ce3f4eada9367a4f0738967f/detection; classtype:policy-violation; sid:47024; rev:2; )
